Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)

Q6 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

The electron concentration in silicon at T = 300 K is n0 = 5 × 104 cm–3. Then the position of fermi level with respect to intrinsic fermi level is _______ eV.

(upto three decimal places) (Assume, kT = 0.0259 eV, = 1.5 × 1010 cm–3)

NAT
Correct answer: 0.327
Solution

0.327 (0.310 - 0.350)

Q7 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Consider a germanium semiconductor at T = 300 K with Nd = 5 × 1015 cm–3 and Na = 0, then the thermal equilibrium hole concentration p0 is equal to _______ × 1011 cm–3. (upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 1.15
Solution

1.15 (1.00 - 1.30)

Q8 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

An n-type silicon sample has a resistivity of 5 Ω-cm at T = 300 K. The donor impurity concentration is equal to ________ × 1014 cm–3. (upto two decimal places)
(Assume, μn = 1350 cm2/V-s)

NAT
Correct answer: 9.26
Solution

9.26 (9.00 - 9.50)

Solution

(Assume μn = 8500 cm2/Vs and μp = 400 cm2/Vs)

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)

Solution

Q14 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

Consider silicon at T = 300 K. Assume electron mobility is μn = 1350 cm2/V-s. Then the kinetic energy of an electron in the conduction band if the applied electric field is 10 V/cm is ________ × 10–11 eV. (upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 5.19
Solution

5.19 (5.00 - 5.30)

NAT
Correct answer: 8.44
Solution

8.44 (8.00 - 8.80)

Q16 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A silicon pn junction with zero bias consists of a two-sided step junction with an n-region of 1018 donors/cm3 and p-region of 1017 acceptors/cm3. The depletion region width on the p-side is 0.5 μm. Then the total width of the depletion region is _________ (in μm)

NAT
Correct answer: 0.55
Solution

0.55 (0.45 - 0.60)
